error_signature: empty strings clear corresponding sheet cells
title: Empty strings clear Google Sheets cell values
symptom: When sending empty strings to a Google Sheets node, the corresponding cells are cleared instead of retaining their original values.
applies_when: Sending data with potential empty values
not_this_if: All values being sent are non-empty
Using a different method to handle empty values
root_cause: The Google Sheets node in n8n does not differentiate between an empty string and a null value when updating cells. As a result, sending an empty string will clear the cell's content instead of leaving it unchanged.
fix_steps: Implement a JavaScript function to filter out empty keys from the input data before it reaches the Google Sheets node.
Configure the Google Sheets node to 'Map Automatically' to ensure only non-empty values are sent.
agent_instruction: Use the provided JavaScript script to drop empty keys before sending data to the Google Sheets node.
